name: Sugar Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix a small amount of water with the granulated sugar to make it wet enough to pack. Scoop the wet sugar into each half of the plastic egg mold.
2. Turn the filled egg mold upside-down on several layers of paper towel and remove the egg mold.
3. Using a spoon, scoop out a half circle from one side of each sugar egg, making sure that when the two sides are put together, the scooped-out sections will match. If you want your sugar eggs to stand, cut away the bottom end of the sugar egg. Let dry overnight or until the surface of the sugar eggs are hard.
4. When the outer side of the sugar eggs are hard, turn them and scoop out the inside, leaving the shell about 1/4 inch in thickness.
5. Seam together the two egg halves using icing. Decorate around the seam and around the hole opening to conceal rough edges. Finish decorating the sugar eggs and fill with your favorite candies.
Optional:
- Color water with food coloring before mixing with sugar.
- Use cake decorating confections for decorating.
- Soak shredded coconut in green food coloring for grass.
